title: Cheirostylis gymnochiloides

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Cheirostylis gymnochiloides include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, this plant is used to prepare various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory conditions.
